line.token: 'buildWhere In Operator Value Must Be Array With At Least One Element. '
'buildWhere In Operator Value Must Be String Or Numeric. '
'buildWhere Between Operator Value Must Be Array With Two Elements. '
'buildWhere Between Operator Value Must Be Numeric. '
'buildOrderBy Order By Key Must Be String,Value Must Be Asc Or Desc. '
'buildLimit Limit Must Be Integer Or Array Be Integer,Not More Than 2'
